hero.title: Radiant Waves Media Morning Global News
hero.description: Monday, July 20, 2026. Good morning. Here are today's verified global headlines, breaking news, business, technology and sports updates from around the world.

breaking: 🔴 Spain defeat Argentina 1-0 after extra time to win the 2026 FIFA World Cup
🔴 Ferran Torres scores the decisive goal as Spain lift their second World Cup trophy
🔴 Lionel Messi's World Cup journey ends as Argentina finish runners-up
🔴 England defeat France 6-4 to secure third place at the FIFA World Cup
🔴 Didier Deschamps steps down as France coach after 14 years in charge
🔴 Global markets begin the week focused on inflation, oil prices and interest-rate expectations
🔴 Artificial intelligence investment continues expanding across major economies
🔴 Governments continue diplomatic efforts on global security and economic cooperation

featured.title: Spain Crowned 2026 FIFA World Cup Champions
featured.content: Spain became FIFA World Cup champions for the second time after defeating defending champions Argentina 1-0 in extra time at MetLife Stadium. Ferran Torres scored the winning goal in the 106th minute after a tense, goalless 90 minutes. The victory completed an outstanding tournament for Spain and marked the end of another memorable World Cup campaign for Lionel Messi and Argentina. 0

articles.title: Spain Lift The World Cup
articles.description: Spain defeated Argentina 1-0 after extra time to become 2026 FIFA World Cup champions. Ferran Torres scored the decisive goal in the 106th minute. 1

articles.title: Argentina Finish As Runners-Up
articles.description: Argentina battled with ten players after Enzo Fernandez was sent off late in normal time but could not stop Spain from claiming the title. 2

articles.title: Ferran Torres Becomes Spain's Hero
articles.description: Ferran Torres etched his name into football history by scoring the extra-time winner that secured Spain's second FIFA World Cup title. 3

articles.title: England Finish Third
articles.description: England defeated France 6-4 in an entertaining third-place playoff to end their World Cup campaign with a victory. 4

articles.title: Deschamps Bids Farewell
articles.description: Didier Deschamps stepped down as France head coach following the World Cup, ending a remarkable 14-year spell that included the 2018 World Cup title. 5

articles.title: World Celebrates Football Finale
articles.description: Millions of supporters celebrated across Spain while fans around the world reflected on the conclusion of the largest FIFA World Cup in history. 6

articles.title: Europe Faces Continuing Heatwave
articles.description: Several European countries continue monitoring high temperatures and elevated wildfire risks during the summer season.

articles.title: United States Successfully Hosts Tournament
articles.description: The United States concluded its role as the principal host of the expanded 2026 FIFA World Cup after a month of football across North America.

articles.title: Asia Continues Technology Growth
articles.description: Investment in artificial intelligence, semiconductor manufacturing and digital infrastructure remains a major priority across Asia.

articles.title: African Economic Cooperation Continues
articles.description: Regional governments continue strengthening trade, infrastructure development and investment partnerships across Africa.

articles.title: Markets Watch Inflation
articles.description: Global investors begin the new week monitoring inflation, oil prices, currency movements and central-bank policy.

articles.title: Artificial Intelligence Investment Grows
articles.description: Governments and technology companies continue increasing investment in AI, cloud computing, robotics and cybersecurity.

articles.title: Global Diplomacy Continues
articles.description: International leaders continue diplomatic engagement on regional security, economic cooperation and humanitarian issues.

breakingHistory: Spain defeated Argentina 1-0 after extra time to win the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
Ferran Torres scored the championship-winning goal.
England defeated France 6-4 to finish third.
Didier Deschamps stepped down as France coach after 14 years.
The 2026 FIFA World Cup concluded after 104 matches.
Global markets begin the week watching inflation and oil prices.
Governments continue diplomatic engagement on security and economic growth.
Spain celebrated their second FIFA World Cup title.
Attention now turns to the start of the new international football season.
